basic_details.job_title: ESIC Gurugram Recruitment 2026 - Walk in for 48 Full Time Contractual Specialist and Senior Resident Posts
basic_details.post_name: Full Time Contractual Specialist and Senior Resident
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Gurugram Full Time Contractual Specialist and Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. 03/2026 on the official website esic.nic.in. A total of 48 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Gurugram Full Time Contractual Specialist and Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.raw: Date of Walk-in Interview: 07 July 2026 Reporting Time: 09:00 AM Closing Time: 10:30 AM

application_fee.details: SC/ST/PWD/Women Candidates & Ex-Servicemen: Nil All Other Categories: Rs. 300/- | Payment Mode: Demand Draft in favour of “ESIC Fund Account No. 2” payable at Gurugram.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 69 years (Specialist) Not exceeding 45 years (Senior Resident)
age_limit.details: Full Time Contractual Specialist: Not exceeding 69 years. Senior Resident: Not exceeding 45 years. Age relaxation as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree or PG Diploma in Concerned Specialty
qualification.details: Qualification: PG Degree or PG Diploma in the concerned Specialty from a Recognized University. For ICU and Accident & Emergency, Postgraduates in Critical Care is required/preferred. Experience (Specialist): Minimum 03 years after PG Degree or 05 years after PG Diploma in concerned specialty from government/recognized private hospital. Experience (Senior Resident): PG preferred. If not available, MBBS with 2 years experience (1 year in specialty) may be considered for 1 year. Registration: Must be registered with Medical Council of India or State Medical Council.

salary_details.details: Full Time Contractual Specialist: Consolidated Rs. 1,48,263/- per month (No Work No Pay Basis). Senior Resident: Initial pay in Level-11 with Basic Pay of Rs. 67,700/- plus other allowances as per 7th CPC. Deductions apply for candidates with only PG Diploma or without PG.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Medical Fitness
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates should report for Walk-in Interview on 07 July 2026 between 09:00 AM to 10:30 AM.
Bring all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies and duly filled Bio-data form (Annexure-F).
Submit Demand Draft (if applicable) at the time of document verification.
Venue: Chambers of Medical Superintendent, 2nd Floor, ESIC Model Hospital, Sector 9A, Gurugram, Haryana - 122001.
important_instructions: Tenure: 03 years with annual renewal based on performance. No TA/DA admissible. Hostel/Quarters/Uniform not provided. Private practice not allowed. Candidates working in Government must submit NOC. Reservation as per Government of India rules.

rows.details: Full Time Contractual Specialist and Senior Resident
PG Degree or PG Diploma in Concerned Specialty
Not exceeding 69 years (Specialist) Not exceeding 45 years (Senior Resident)

content_sections.heading: ESIC Gurugram Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: 1. Full Time Contractual Specialist (FTCS) - 14 Posts 2. Senior Resident (03 Years) - 34 Posts

content_sections.heading: ESIC Gurugram Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Qualification : PG Degree or PG Diploma in the concerned Specialty from a Recognized University. For ICU and Accident & Emergency, Postgraduates in Critical Care is required/preferred. Experience (Specialist) : Minimum 03 years after PG Degree or 05 years after PG Diploma in concerned specialty from government/recognized private hospital. Experience (Senior Resident) : PG preferred. If not available, MBBS with 2 years experience (1 year in specialty) may be considered for 1 year. Registration : Must be registered with Medical Council of India or State Medical Council.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Gurugram Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Full Time Contractual Specialist : Consolidated Rs. 1,48,263/- per month (No Work No Pay Basis). Senior Resident : Initial pay in Level-11 with Basic Pay of Rs. 67,700/- plus other allowances as per 7th CPC. Deductions apply for candidates with only PG Diploma or without PG.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Gurugram Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit (as on 07 July 2026)
content_sections.text: Full Time Contractual Specialist : Not exceeding 69 years. Senior Resident : Not exceeding 45 years. Age relaxation as per rules.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Gurugram Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: SC/ST/PWD/Women Candidates & Ex-Servicemen: Nil All Other Categories: Rs. 300/- Payment Mode : Demand Draft in favour of “ESIC Fund Account No. 2” payable at Gurugram.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Gurugram Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Date of Walk-in Interview : 07 July 2026 Reporting Time : 09:00 AM Closing Time : 10:30 AM

content_sections.heading: ESIC Gurugram Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Medical Fitness

content_sections.heading: ESIC Gurugram Recruitment 2026 - General Information / Instructions
content_sections.text: Tenure: 03 years with annual renewal based on performance. No TA/DA admissible. Hostel/Quarters/Uniform not provided. Private practice not allowed. Candidates working in Government must submit NOC. Reservation as per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Gurugram Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates should report for Walk-in Interview on 07 July 2026 between 09:00 AM to 10:30 AM . Bring all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies and duly filled Bio-data form (Annexure-F). Submit Demand Draft (if applicable) at the time of document verification. Venue : Chambers of Medical Superintendent, 2nd Floor, ESIC Model Hospital, Sector 9A, Gurugram, Haryana - 122001.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for ESIC Gurugram Specialist and Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 07 July 2026 from 09:00 AM to 10:30 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in ESIC Model Hospital Gurugram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 48 vacancies - 14 for Full Time Contractual Specialists and 34 for Senior Residents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Full Time Contractual Specialist in ESIC Gurugram?
faq.answer: Consolidated remuneration of Rs. 1,48,263/- per month on No Work No Pay basis.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for Senior Resident posts at ESIC Gurugram?
faq.answer: Not exceeding 45 years as on the date of interview (relaxation as per rules).

faq.question: Q5. Is prior experience mandatory for Specialist posts in this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, minimum 3 years experience after PG Degree or 5 years after PG Diploma in the concerned specialty.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for ESIC Gurugram walk-in interview?
faq.answer: All original certificates, self-attested photocopies, identity/address proof, registration certificate, experience certificates, and filled Annexure-F form.
